description_long: This is a red carbonated soft drink can with a vibrant, glossy finish and water droplet graphics covering its surface, giving it a cold, refreshing appearance. The front prominently displays the brand name 'Sá Xị' in large, stylized white and yellow letters, with additional Vietnamese text and a swirling liquid graphic below. The can features a standard aluminum pull-tab top, and the lower front section indicates a net content of 330 ml. On the sides, there are detailed product and nutritional labels, as well as a barcode, all printed in white on the red background. The top rim is silver, and the bottom rim is gold, providing a visual contrast to the main red body.
description: A glossy red aluminum can of Sá Xị soft drink with bold branding, water droplet graphics, and detailed labeling.
description_view_0: The front view shows the large 'Sá Xị' logo, swirling liquid graphic, and product volume information clearly.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the nutritional and product information panel, with less emphasis on the main logo.
description_view_2: A slightly angled front view, showing both the main logo and part of the nutritional label, with the pull-tab top visible.
description_view_3: Another side view focusing on the barcode and product details, with the main logo partially visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular logo with green, red, and white colors is visible at the top front of the can, above the 'Sá Xị' text.
attribute_flavor_indication: The swirling liquid graphic and the word 'CHUONG DUONG' suggest a specific flavor, but no explicit flavor text is visible.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional and product information is visible on the side of the can, including a barcode and text in white.
